name: think
description: Reason about a problem through a named reasoning lens that forces a structured analysis the default 'think harder' won't produce. Three lenses — two take a problem APART, one puts a claim ON TRIAL: first-principles (decompose DOWN — strip to irreducible axioms, rebuild from them, surface where that diverges from convention), orthogonal (decompose SIDEWAYS — factor a tangled phenomenon into mutually-independent axes, verify the independence, name what was conflated), and dialectic (put a claim ON TRIAL — steelman its strongest case AND its strongest attack, surface the deepest load-bearing assumption, name the experiment that would decide it; verdict is three-way, not pass/fail). Each reasons in-chat (no file artifact) and feeds one-way into shape (an insight → a thought / mockup / plan). Standalone — no nav/shape dependency.
